notes: Acquired by Attachmate for $2.2B in April 2011 after NT displacement. SUSE Linux business separated. Patents sold to Microsoft consortium for $450M.
Windows NT Server identified as primary competitive threat to NetWare. NT ultimately won the enterprise server OS war.
OS/2 Warp Server mentioned as secondary competitive threat to NetWare; OS/2 ultimately lost to NT.
Lotus Notes referenced as primary competitor to Novell GroupWise in groupware market; IBM acquired Lotus in 1995.
Netscape CollabraShare referenced as groupware competitor. Netscape acquired by AOL in 1999.
Acquired Novell in 2011 for $2.2B; itself acquired by Micro Focus in 2014.
CA Unicenter referenced as competitor in network management. Acquired by Broadcom in 2018.
